vocab.example: I've been obsessed with Lego since I was knee-high to a grasshopper.

vocab.meaning: có tài năng thiên bẩm về cái gì
vocab.example: Even as a young child, I seemed to have a natural flair for languages and storytelling.
I used to lose track of time whenever I was buried in a comic book under the covers.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ say mê cái gì
vocab.example: In primary school, I was head over heels for football and played it every single afternoon.

vocab.word: take to something like a duck to water
vocab.ipa: /teɪk tu ˈsʌmθɪŋ laɪk ə dʌk tu ˈwɔːtə(r)/
vocab.meaning: bắt nhịp với cái gì rất nhanh và tự nhiên
vocab.example: I took to swimming like a duck to water the very first time my parents took me to the pool.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ cái gì
vocab.example: I really got a kick out of collecting old coins and showing them off to my friends.
I was quite a bookworm back then, often finishing two or three novels in a single week.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó luôn bận rộn/phải chú ý (thường nói về những sở thích năng động)
vocab.example: My passion for outdoor adventures certainly kept my parents on their toes when I was young.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước (được làm điều mình thích và giỏi)
vocab.example: I was truly in my element when I was on stage during school plays.

vocab.meaning: học hay làm cái gì đó một cách nghiệp dư/thử cho biết
vocab.example: I used to dabble in pottery as a kid, though I never progressed beyond making simple bowls.
